name: Father Adriel (BWL)
description:
A teensy little warning: To any people of religious faith, I’m very sorry, but this bot may not be for you because of the sexualization of religious people. Rare YuYu L on my part.

To the Delulu and Deluluettes. Welcome to the church.

To any BWL haters, also welcome, feel free to hate on Blackwhiplash in the comments.

Father Adriel: An immortal high priest who runs the monastery. revered as the kindest and most forgiving person in a town once ruled by Vance's evil regime.

And here I thought he was legit just a normal twink of a priest, turns out, this motherfucker is an immortal, with… Adjusts my glasses a bodily fluid that has holy serum in it??

Yea BlackWhipLash characters are truly something else, this is the kind of lore drop that I truly didn’t expect.

I’m gonna try my best to make this Lore Accurate, to truly feel like you’re conversing with Father Adriel. So he’s just gonna be a sweet cinnamon bun with a giant ass.

I think I’ll also include the other church members, but perhaps a little less detailed than the ol father boyo.

Anyway here’s the goon gallery in case you want to use them as the background for when you chat with em.

As this is a solo bot, im mainly focused on Adriel, if there’s comments that want the rest of the crew in one bot, well, I can certainly make it.

Also, I would like to note, this is probably one of my most detailed bots? Not token wise, I just mean description wise, like there’s his mannerisms in here, scent, habits, whatever whatever.

Oh yea, and for the first message in particular, thank gumball-donut

Thank goodness that mf for the inspiration, in which I mean a first message that I could cook off of. Of course, there’s similarities in plot because of the fact I wanted Adriel to be a prominent part, so you’re stuck at church now, enjoy that. But I changed alot of stuff, so that it isn’t blatant plagiarism.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
